ToolTreaux Waterproof Multi Surface Fluorescent Glow in the Dark Tape 16ft Roll

The ultimate solution for visibility and safety in dark or low light environments is the reliable glow in the dark tape from ToolTreaux. Ideal for various applications such as light switches, remote controls, sockets, locks, flashlights, door handles, as labels, to mark outdoor gear, stairways or pathways, other home essentials items and much more!

This weatherproof and waterproof tape is designed to stick to almost any clean surface, offering enhanced visibility wherever you need it most. With its long lasting glow and durable construction, it can withstand rain, snow and extreme temperatures. This glow in the dark tape ensures secure and permanent attachment with engineered pressure sensitive adhesive; here’s how to use it:

Key Features

  • GLOW IN THE DARK TAPE: Provide illumination in dark or low light environments, making it ideal for various applications such as switches, remote controls, sockets, locks, flashlights, door handles, as labels, to mark outdoor gear, stairways, items at home and much more
  • WATERPROOF & WEATHERPROOF: Suitable for indoor and outdoor, residential, commercial or industrial use, this glow in the dark tape ensures secure and permanent attachment with engineered pressure sensitive adhesive; Glows up to four hours after exposure to light
  • HOW TO USE: Clean and dry the surface thoroughly before application; Cut the tape to the desired length and firmly press it onto the surface; Expose the tape to light for at least 1 hour to activate the glow effect
  • MULTIDISCIPLINARY TOOL: Glow in the dark can be included in a jobsite toolbox or construction site, with camping gear, survival kits or emergency supplies, RVs, garages, workshops and more to help with quick recognition of items or spaces in dark environments
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 1 inch width x 16 feet length; Color: Yellow; Material: Polyethylene Terephthalate; Instruction manual included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTX-BCOJHQSN
  • UPC: 810131707491

Usage Instructions: 1. Surface Preparation: Clean and dry the surface thoroughly before application 2. Cutting and Application: Cut the tape to the desired length and firmly press it onto the surface 3. Activation: Expose the tape to light for at least 1 hour to activate the glow effect

ToolTreaux’s fluorescent tape glows for approximately four hours with previous one hour exposure to a light source. Glow in the dark tape is suitable for indoor and outdoor, residential, commercial or industrial use.

NOTE: Avoid using on dirty surfaces, peeling or cracked walls, or surfaces with impurities, as this may affect adhesion and performance
